creator: freebsdbugs@ontoemail.com
text:
I can confirm that removing the dependency on ImageMagick 6 does not cause any compilation issues. Reading the CMakeLists.txt shows no requirement for ImageMagick at all.

Removing this dependency will help greatly as this package is pulled in by the KDE Plasma Desktop preventing installation of any packages requiring ImageMagick 7 due to install conflicts between ImageMagick 6 and 7.
